insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG SET TENANT_ID = #tenantId#, COMPANY_ID = #companyId#, UPLOAD_LIMIT = #uploadLimit#, TOTAL_LIMIT = #personalLimit# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT U.CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAY_NAME, U.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.DESCRIPTION ELSE U.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY_NAME, IF(W.TOTAL_CAPACITY IS NOT NULL, W.TOTAL_CAPACITY, IFNULL(C.TOTAL_LIMIT, 0)) AS TOTAL_CAPACITY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.TITLE ELSE U.TITLE2 END AS JOB_TITLE, IF(W.TOTAL_USED IS NOT NULL, W.TOTAL_USED, 0) AS TOTAL_USED, U.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER U LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER W ON U.CN = W.CN LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG C ON U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID WHERE U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
U.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchStr#), '%')
U.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchStr#), '%')
U.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchStr#), '%')
U.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchStr#), '%')

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER SET TOTAL_CAPACITY = #totalCapacity# WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
